text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's quite the scary face. Is something<n>wrong?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It is! I've just heard tell of a student who<n>is
violating multiple school rules on a<n>regular basis!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Multiple school rules?! Are you sayingthere is a delinquent among our ranks?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Firsthand reports mention an<n>incredibly pale
student walking around<n>the school IN THE
MIDDLE OF THE<n>NIGHT!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Nooo! Leaving one's dorm after curfew is<n>
STRICTLY prohibited!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's not all! This student has also been<n>sneaking
into other students' rooms and<n>climbing onto
their ceilings! INVADING<n>THEIR PRIVACY!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
This cannot go on! We must see to it<n>that the
culprit is punished AT ONCE!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, by these hands, we will guide this<n>delinquent
down the path to redemption<n>and righteousness!
Charge! Bakushiiin!
